subtitle.ja: 中指の構えから始めます。左手親指の糸を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Japanese Opening". Transfer the left thumb string to the index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左手小指の糸を薬指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the left little-finger string to the ring finger.

subtitle.ja: 右手も同様に、親指の糸を人差し指へ、小指の糸を薬指に移します
subtitle.en: Do the same on the right hand, transferring the thumb string to the index finger and the little-finger string to the ring finger.

subtitle.ja: 左手薬指の背にかかっている糸を右手で持ち、中指の糸の上に重ねます。重ねた輪の中から中指の糸を引き出します
subtitle.en: Take the string on the back of the left ring finger with the right hand, place it over the middle-finger string, and draw the middle-finger string out through the overlapped loop.

subtitle.ja: 引き出した中指の輪を人差し指に重ねて糸を引き出し、親指にかけます
subtitle.en: Place the drawn-out middle-finger loop over the index finger, pull the index-finger string through, and place it on the thumb.

subtitle.ja: 右手も同様に、薬指の輪から中指の輪、中指の輪から人差し指の輪を引き出して親指にかけます
subtitle.en: Do the same on the right hand, drawing out the middle-finger loop from the ring-finger loop, then the index-finger loop from the middle-finger loop, and placing it on the thumb.

subtitle.ja: 両手親指で、人差し指手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から、親指同士を繋いでいる上の糸を残したまま、下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper string that runs between the thumbs, release only the lower thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指向こうの糸から薬指向こうの糸まで、同様の操作を繰り返します
subtitle.en: Repeat the same operation from the far index-finger strings through to the far ring-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指と小指の指先を合わせ、親指の糸を小指に移します
subtitle.en: Bring the tips of both thumbs and little fingers together, and transfer the thumb strings to the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の前にある輪に親指を下から入れて完成です
subtitle.en: Insert the thumbs from below into the loops in front of the index fingers, and show the finished figure.
